title: LongContext 4096 + Full SOTA Stack + QAT Int4/Int6 → 16 Layers
body:
## Submissions

Five experiments targeting sub-1.1698 BPB. Compute grant received ($500) — full 3-seed H100 runs in progress. Results and train logs will be added before final review.

---

### 1. LongContext 4096 + Full SOTA Stack
**Folder:** `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-24_LongContext4096_FullSOTA/`

Complete PR #549 stack with `train_seq_len` raised from 2048 → **4096**. Two-line diff from PR #549. Every technique preserved: 11L, LeakyReLU(0.5)², SmearGate, BigramHash, XSA-4, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, VE128, EMA+SWA, GPTQ-lite int6, Parallel Muon, Legal TTT. Dynamic NTK auto-scales `rope_base` to ~48550.

---

### 2. LongContext 4096 + Int6 QAT (Safe)
**Folder:** `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-25_LongContext4096_Int6_QAT/`

Same as #1 but with `QAT_ENABLED=1` from step 1 (not just the final 15% of warmdown). CastedLinear applies 6-bit STE fake-quant throughout training, matching the int6 export. Hypothesis: full-run QAT reduces post-quantization degradation vs late-only QAT.

---

### 3. QAT Int4 + 16 Layers (Fixed)
**Folder:** `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-24_QAT_Int4_16L_FullSOTA/`

Full SOTA stack with 16 layers via int4 nibble-packing (2 weights/byte). Int4 STE fake-quant on CastedLinear activates at `late_qat_threshold=0.15`. QAT and export now use the same precision (`/7.0`, clamp `[-8, 7]`). Previous version had a mismatch (trained 6-bit, exported 4-bit) — fixed here.

---

### 4. LongContext 4096 + Int4 + 16 Layers (Fixed)
**Folder:** `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-24_LongContext4096_Int4_16L_FullSOTA/`

Combines #1 (4096 context) and #3 (int4 16L). Same QAT mismatch fix applied (CastedLinear now uses `/7.0` clamp `[-8,7]` to match int4 export). Estimated artifact: ~13.5–14MB (well under 16MB).

---

### 5. LongContext 4096 + Int4 Bank QAT + 16 Layers (Risky)
**Folder:** `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-25_LongContext4096_Int4_BankQAT/`

Same as #4 plus full-model bank QAT: `_fake_quant_int4_bank()` applies int4 STE fake-quant to every bank weight slice (`qo_bank`, `kv_bank`, `mlp_up_bank`, `mlp_down_bank`) during the training forward pass. Prior int4 experiments only QAT'd `CastedLinear` — ~5% of parameters. This is the first experiment where the remaining ~95% (all attention + MLP weights) are actually prepared for int4 export.

---

## Status

- [x] Scripts complete, QAT mismatch bugs fixed
- [x] All experiments have submission.json and README
- [x] `zstandard` added to requirements.txt
- [ ] Full H100 runs (3 seeds each) — in progress
- [ ] Results tables and train logs — to be added
